nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

nas-deploy/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-deploy/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compile errors for missing symbols.

nas-music/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact coordinates to the new group ID and artifact ID required for modern JDBC drivers.
nas-music/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build repositories; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing compile errors.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate validation API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.validation classes are not available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing compile errors.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21/Spring Boot 3.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.servlet package is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.validation package is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace javax.transaction import with jakarta.transaction to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
nas-music/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.transaction package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.transaction does not exist' on JDK 21/Spring Boot 3.

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x/Jakarta EE 9+; using them causes a compile error (class not found).

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.websocket does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.websocket does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which enforces Jakarta EE namespaces.

nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.general_idea: Replace the deprecated javax.annotation.Nonnull import with the Jakarta EE equivalent jakarta.annotation.Nonnull to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 standards.
nas-video/src/main/java/top/itning/yunsh.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available by default in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist' if not replaced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 21 and Jakarta dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing API errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21; keeping the property at 17 may cause compiler warnings or incorrect bytecode version generation depending on the build plugin configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly, leading to compilation errors in mapper implementations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.validation API with jakarta.validation API to match Spring Boot 3.x namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; javax.validation classes are no longer available, causing compile-time 'package not found' errors.
